name: @types/gradient-string
usage_summary: The runtime package gradient-string is imported directly in packages/cli-kit/src/private/node/ui/components/TextAnimation.tsx. gradient-string@2.0.2 does not ship its own .d.ts files, so @types/gradient-string provides the necessary type declarations.
how_to_remove: Not a removal candidate — still needed. If gradient-string ever ships bundled types or is replaced, remove @types/gradient-string from cli-kit devDependencies at the same time.
replacement_reason: gradient-string is actively used and does not bundle its own types. @types/gradient-string has had 0 releases in the last 24 months (the @types package is essentially stable/complete), but the underlying package is still in use so the type package must be retained.
